info.description: Filtered OpenAPI description for the stateless synchronous Alibaba Cloud Object Detection proxy. The gateway serves only the allowlisted operations defined in the paired YAML manifest.
info.title: Alibaba Cloud Object Detection API

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of DetectIPCObject, an IPC image object detection capability under the object detection (objectdet) category. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=DetectIPCObject and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

ImageURL.description: The URL of the image. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. If your file is stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Data.description: Content of the returned result data.

Elements.description: Collection of detected targets. This field is empty if no targets are detected.

items.description: Coordinates of the detection box, in pixels, in the format [left, top, right, bottom].

Score.description: Confidence level of the detection box. The value range is [0.0, 1.0].

TargetRate.description: Ratio of the area of the object detection bounding box to the entire image area. The value range is [0.0, 1.0], where 1.0 indicates full screen.

Type.description:
Name of the object corresponding to the detection box. Valid values are as follows:

- PERSON: person
- VEHICLE: vehicle
- CAT: cat
- DOG: dog

Height.description: Height of the image, in pixels.

Width.description: The width of the image, in pixels.

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the DetectKitchenAnimals API under the object detection (objectdet) category. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=DetectKitchenAnimals and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

ImageURLA.description: URL of image A. We recommend using an OSS Link in the China (Shanghai) Region. If the file is stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) Region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

ImageURLB.description: URL of image B. We recommend using an OSS Link in the China (Shanghai) Region. If the file is stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) Region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Left.description: Y coordinate of the top-left corner, in pixels.

Top.description: X coordinate of the top-left corner, in pixels.

Score.description: Probability value of the Detection result.

Type.description:
Type of Detection result. Valid values:

- mouse: mouse
- cat: cat

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the DetectMainBody API in the object detection (objectdet) category. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=DetectMainBody and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

parameters.description: The image URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. If your file is stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).
parameters.name: ImageURL

schema.description: The image URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. If your file is stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Data.description: The content of the returned result data.

X.description: The x coordinate of the element.

Y.description: The y coordinate of the element.

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the DetectObject operation in the object detection (objectdet) category. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=DetectObject and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

ImageURL.description: The URL of the image. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For files stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Elements.description: A collection of detection box data.

items.description: The coordinates of the detection box, in the format `[left, top, right, bottom]`.

Score.description: The confidence level of the detected object, with a value range of 0 to 1.

Type.description: The name of the object corresponding to the detection box. The specific types are as follows.

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and sample of DetectVehicleICongestion in the object detection (objectdet) category. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=DetectVehicleICongestion and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

ImageURL.description: The URL of the image. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. If your file is stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

PreRegionIntersectFeatures.description: Vehicle features corresponding to vehicle detection boxes from the previous frame that intersect with specified areas.

Features.description: The feature is a Base64-encoded string.

items.description: A Base64-encoded string. For Base64 encoding operations on files, see [File Base64 Processing](~~468191~~).

RoadRegions.description: Multiple regions. The format is `[RoadRegion_1, RoadRegion_2, ..., RoadRegion_N]`.

RoadRegion.description: The X and Y coordinates of the four vertices of an arbitrary quadrilateral, formatted as `[x1,y1,x2,y2,x3,y3,x4,y4]`.

Point.description: The coordinates of a vertex of the quadrilateral.

X.description: The X value of the coordinate point.

Y.description: The Y value of the coordinate point.

Data.description: The content of the returned result data.

Elements.description: A collection of vehicle detection boxes.

Boxes.description: The coordinates of the detection box, in the format `[left, top, right, bottom]`.

Bottom.description: The y-coordinate of the bottom-right corner of the rectangular area.

Left.description: The x-axis coordinate of the top-left corner of the rectangular area.

Right.description: The x-coordinate of the bottom-right corner of the rectangular area.

Top.description: The y-axis coordinate of the top-left corner of the rectangular area.

Id.description: The ID of the detection box.

Score.description: The confidence level of the detection box, ranging from `[0,1]`.

TypeName.description: The object corresponding to the detection box. The value is only `vehicle`.

RegionIntersectFeatures.description: The vehicle features corresponding to the vehicle detection bounding boxes that intersect with each specified area.

Features.description: The feature is a Base64-encoded string. For information about how to perform Base64 encoding on files, see [File Base64 Processing](~~468191~~).

items.description: This Base64-encoded string is used to determine whether vehicles detected in two frames are the same vehicle. For information about how to perform Base64 encoding on files, see [File Base64 Processing](~~468191~~).

RegionIntersectMatched.description: Indicates which feature in RegionIntersectFeatures of the current frame matches a feature in PreRegionIntersectFeatures.

items.description:
When two vehicles across two frames are matched, it indicates that the vehicle experienced congestion or remained stationary during the time interval between the two frames.

> **-1** indicates no matched feature. If a match exists, the corresponding detection box ID is displayed. For example, if the vehicle detection box IDs are `[1,2,3]` and RegionIntersectMatched displays `[-1,-1,-1]`, none of the three regions have matches. If RegionIntersectMatched displays `[-1,2,3]`, region 1 has no match, while regions 2 and 3 are matched.

RegionIntersects.description:
The vehicle features corresponding to the vehicle detection bounding boxes that intersect with each specified area.  

For example, if the return result is `[{"Ids":[1,3]}, {"Ids":[2,4]}]`, `{"Ids":[1,3]}` represents the IDs of vehicle detection bounding boxes that intersect with area 1, and `{"Ids":[2,4]}` represents the IDs of vehicle detection bounding boxes that intersect with area 2. If a vehicle appears within a specified area, it indicates that the vehicle is occupying the lane.  

Except for the detection bounding boxes whose IDs are included in **RegionIntersects**, all other detection bounding boxes are outside the specified areas.

Ids.description: The multiple IDs of vehicle detection bounding boxes that intersect with each specified area.

items.description:
Multiple IDs of vehicle detection boxes that intersect with each specified area.

For example, {"Ids":[1,3]} represents the IDs of vehicle detection boxes that intersect with the corresponding area.

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the DetectVehicleIllegalParking API under the object detection (objectdet) category. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=DetectVehicleIllegalParking and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

ImageURL.description: The image URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) Region. For files stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) Region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

RoadRegions.description: Multiple areas. The format is [RoadRegion_1, RoadRegion_2, ..., RoadRegion_N].

RoadRegion.description: The X and Y coordinates of the four vertices of an arbitrary quadrilateral, in the format `[x1,y1,x2,y2,x3,y3,x4,y4]`.

Point.description: The coordinates of a vertex of the quadrilateral.

X.description: The X value of the coordinate point.

Y.description: The Y value of the coordinate point.

Elements.description: A collection of vehicle detection boxes.

Boxes.description: The coordinates of the detection box, in the format `[left, top, right, bottom]`.

Bottom.description: The vertical axis coordinate of the bottom-right corner of the rectangular area.

Left.description: The x-axis coordinate of the top-left corner of the rectangular area.

Right.description: The horizontal axis coordinate of the bottom-right corner of the rectangular area.

Top.description: The vertical axis coordinate of the top-left corner of the rectangular area.

Id.description: The ID of the detection box.

Score.description: The confidence level of the detection box, ranging from `[0,1]`.

TypeName.description: The object corresponding to the detection box. The value is only `vehicle`.

RegionIntersects.description:
The vehicle features corresponding to the bounding boxes of detected vehicles that intersect with each given region.

For example, if the returned result is `[{"Ids":[1,3]}, {"Ids":[2,4]}]`, then `{"Ids":[1,3]}` represents the IDs of vehicle detection boxes intersecting with region 1, and `{"Ids":[2,4]}` represents those intersecting with region 2. If a vehicle appears within a specified region, it indicates that the vehicle is occupying the area.

Detection boxes whose IDs are not included in **RegionIntersects** represent vehicles detected outside the specified regions.

Ids.description: Multiple IDs of vehicle detection boxes that intersect with each specified area.

items.description:
Multiple IDs of vehicle detection boxes that intersect with each specified area.  

For example, {"Ids":[1,3]} represents the IDs of vehicle detection boxes that intersect with the corresponding area.

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of DetectWhiteBaseImage under the object detection (objectdet) category. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=DetectWhiteBaseImage and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

ImageURL.description: The URL of the image. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. If your file is stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

WhiteBase.description:
Indicates whether the image has a white background.

- 0: Not a white background

- 1: White background

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the DetectWorkwear API in the object detection (objectdet) category. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=DetectWorkwear and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

MaxNum.description: Set the maximum number of human bodies to detect. The maximum value is 5.

Threshold.description: Set the threshold. The value range is 0.0 to 1.0. A higher value indicates a stricter requirement for similarity to the sample data. The default value is 0.4.

ImageUrl.description: The image URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. If your file is stored locally or in an OSS bucket in a different region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

items.description:
The properties to detect. Valid values:

- mask: mask
- hat: hat
- clothes: clothes
> The clothes property is deprecated. Detection results for clothes will no longer be included in the output.

Property.description: Properties of the detection result. This field returns a value only when **Type** is 0 or 1; otherwise, it returns empty.

No.description: The probability of not wearing a mask, not wearing workwear, or not wearing a hat.

Threshold.description: The threshold recommended by the system.

Yes.description: The probability of wearing a mask, wearing workwear, or wearing a hat.

Rectangles.description: Position information of the detection result.

Left.description: Y coordinate of the top-left corner, in pixels.

Top.description: X coordinate of the top-left corner, in pixels.

Score.description: Probability value of the detection result.

Type.description:
Type of the detection result. Valid values:  

- 0: human body  
- 1: human head  
- 2: human face  
- 3: hand
